source.page_label: WA Resident Game Bird Seasons | eRegulations
source.update_note: 2026-27 upland game bird data from WDFW regulations. Washington has forest grouse, pheasant (west & east), quail, chukar, partridge, and turkey.

species.name: Forest Grouse (Ruffed, Sooty, Dusky, Spruce)
species.bag_limit: 4 daily (max 3 each of Dusky/Sooty, Spruce, Ruffed)

species.name: Ring-necked Pheasant (Western WA)
species.season_raw: Regular: Sep 20 - Nov 30 (8am-4pm); Extended (no releases): Dec 1-15

species.name: Ring-necked Pheasant (Eastern WA)
species.season_raw: Oct 17 - Jan 19 (regular). Youth: Sep 12-13. Senior: Sep 14-18.

species.name: California Quail & Bobwhite
species.season_raw: Western WA: Sep 19 - Nov 30; Eastern WA: Oct 3 - Jan 19

species.name: Mountain Quail
species.hunting_units: Western WA only; Eastern WA closed

licenses.name: Western WA Pheasant Permit (3-Day)
licenses.covers: Required to hunt pheasants on western WA release sites

key_notes.title: Washington forest grouse (Ruffed, Sooty, Dusky, Spruce) have a combined daily bag of 4 statewide. Season runs Sep 15 - Jan 15.

sources.label: WDFW — Forest Grouse
sources.evidence: Forest Grouse: Sep 15 - Jan 15. 4 daily, 12 possession. Max 3 each of Dusky/Sooty, Spruce, Ruffed.

key_notes.title: Pheasant hunting in western WA is on release sites with modified hours (8am-4pm). A special Western WA Pheasant Permit ($55.13) is required.

sources.label: WDFW — Western WA Pheasant
sources.evidence: Western WA Pheasant: Regular Sep 20 - Nov 30 (8am-4pm). Western WA Pheasant Permit: $55.13.

key_notes.title: Mountain quail are only open in Western Washington. Eastern WA is closed for mountain quail.

sources.label: WDFW — Mountain Quail
sources.evidence: Mountain Quail: Western WA only. Eastern WA closed. 2 either sex daily.

key_notes.title: Chukar and gray partridge hunting is limited to Eastern Washington. Chukar season runs later (through Jan 31) than most other upland birds.

sources.label: WDFW — Chukar & Partridge
sources.evidence: Chukar: Eastern WA only, Oct 3 - Jan 31. Gray Partridge: Oct 3 - Jan 19.
